title: Error reading properties in HubSpot node execution
symptom: When executing a workflow with the HubSpot Customer Search node, n8n throws a TypeError indicating it cannot read properties of undefined.
applies_when: Attempting to filter by datetime fields
not_this_if: Using HTTP Request node for filtering
root_cause: The HubSpot Customer Search node does not support certain filter operators for datetime fields, leading to an undefined property access when the node attempts to process the request. This is a limitation in the node's implementation.
fix_steps: Switch to using the HTTP Request node instead of the HubSpot Customer Search node.
Configure the HTTP Request node with the appropriate JSON body for filtering, including pagination settings.
agent_instruction: Use the HTTP Request node to filter by datetime fields instead of the HubSpot Customer Search node.
